title: [regression] builds from git repo URLs don't recurse submodules (again)
body:
**Description**

Builds from git repo URLs don't recurse git submodules. This was fixed once in https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/3104 but is now broken again.


**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. `podman build -t foo https://github.com/dustymabe/dustymabe.com.git#delete`


**Describe the results you received:**

This doesn't work today. See output below with `podman-4.3.1-1.fc37.x86_64`

```
[core@weevm ~]$ rpm -q podman
podman-4.3.1-1.fc37.x86_64
[core@weevm ~]$ podman build -t foo https://github.com/dustymabe/dustymabe.com.git#delete
STEP 1/3: FROM registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:33
Trying to pull registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:33...
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 2861e4f9ec1a done  
Copying config 3e786a3571 done  
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
STEP 2/3: ADD . /context/
--> ae1ee14cb30
STEP 3/3: RUN test -f /context/hugo/themes/beautifulhugo/LICENSE
Error: building at STEP "RUN test -f /context/hugo/themes/beautifulhugo/LICENSE": while running runtime: exit status 1
```


**Describe the results you expected:**

This worked at some point in the past. See output below with `podman-3.4.7-2.fc35.x86_64`.

```
[dustymabe@media ~]$ rpm -q podman
podman-3.4.7-2.fc35.x86_64
[dustymabe@media ~]$ podman build -t foo https://github.com/dustymabe/dustymabe.com.git#delete
STEP 1/3: FROM registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:33
Trying to pull registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:33...
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 2861e4f9ec1a done  
Copying config 3e786a3571 done  
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
STEP 2/3: ADD . /context/
--> f92203c90e9
STEP 3/3: RUN test -f /context/hugo/themes/beautifulhugo/LICENSE
COMMIT foo
--> 7f9b32e286c
Successfully tagged localhost/foo:latest
7f9b32e286c50f204edb7927f63cc5a7674acc7cf4e788842545fe233ad5248c
```

comments.body: Thanks @dustymabe . I'll take a look at it :)
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@dustymabe Thanks for the reminder I'll take a look at this :)
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
I was checking this and I think `recurse submodule` was removed because it leaves room for following vulnerability https://github.com/moby/moby/security/advisories/GHSA-vp35-85q5-9f25.

Is there commit where it was intentionally removed?

Wouldn't an updated `git` on the user's system fix the bug?

This now represents a behavior change between `docker` and `podman`:


```
[core@cosa-devsh ~]$ sudo docker build -t foo https://github.com/dustymabe/dustymabe.com.git#delete
Sending build context to Docker daemon   30.2MB
Step 1/3 : FROM registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:33
33: Pulling from fedora
2861e4f9ec1a: Pull complete 
Digest: sha256:9b7180776127b37ccda44241e911f6eee670fb6b255330a921f64a16865e2654
Status: Downloaded newer image for registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:33
 ---> 3e786a357141
Step 2/3 : ADD . /context/
 ---> ecc1a948a380
Step 3/3 : RUN test -f /context/hugo/themes/beautifulhugo/LICENSE
 ---> Running in 682e5f914373
Removing intermediate container 682e5f914373
 ---> e6a304d724de
Successfully built e6a304d724de
Successfully tagged foo:latest
[core@cosa-devsh ~]$ 
[core@cosa-devsh ~]$ 
[core@cosa-devsh ~]$ rpm -q moby-engine
moby-engine-20.10.23-1.fc37.x86_64
```
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
